non_claim_lock: Memory promotion is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.
promotion_rule: A memory candidate may promote only when evidence utility is sufficient, negative controls pass, runtime decision is not blocking, downgrade path is declared, falsification condition is declared, and non-claim locks are preserved.
purpose: Convert repository-bound feedback/control evidence into downgrade-safe memory promotion decisions.
title: CMS-SA v0.3b5 - Memory Promotion Kernel
